fingerprint: Every number in WIN-054 is globe-derived. The dome's sole cosmological parameter (λ_A = c/H₀ = 4,283 Mpc) is literally the Hubble distance with H₀ = 70 km/s/Mpc. The 'aetheric redshift formula' z = D/λ_A is algebraically identical to Hubble's law. No dome-derived cosmological infrastructure exists.

globe_values.globe_derivation: c / H₀ = 299,792 km/s / 70 km/s/Mpc = 4,283 Mpc — standard Hubble distance, determined from Planck CMB, BAO, Cepheid, and SNe Ia observations over decades
Spectroscopic redshift measured using standard atomic transition lines, interpreted as cosmological expansion (or peculiar velocity + expansion). Calibration chain assumes standard physics.
globe_values.dome_label: z = D/λ_A (aetheric medium refractive index gradient)
globe_values.dome_code: No code computes or verifies this redshift

globe_values.globe_derivation: Derived from weak gravitational lensing (GR on curved spacetime) and X-ray temperature profiles assuming hydrostatic equilibrium in a gravitational potential well. Both methods require Newtonian or GR gravity.
globe_values.dome_label: None — dome has no mass measurement framework
globe_values.dome_code: No code references El Gordo mass

globe_values.globe_derivation: From N-body + hydrodynamical simulations (Zhang et al. 2015, Molnar & Birkinshaw 2024) using standard gravity, gas dynamics, and ΛCDM initial conditions. The velocity is what makes the merger 'impossible' — but it's computed using globe physics.
globe_values.dome_label: None — dome provides no collision dynamics

globe_values.globe_derivation: Asencio et al. 2023 computed this within ΛCDM using halo mass functions from standard N-body simulations. The σ count is meaningful only within ΛCDM — it measures how unlikely El Gordo is IF ΛCDM is correct.
globe_values.dome_code: No code computes or monitors this statistic

scale_absurdity.ratio: ~5.7 × 10¹⁷ — El Gordo is 570 quadrillion dome-radii away
scale_absurdity.note: The dome's physical universe (disc + firmament) has no spatial framework for objects at cosmological distances. The firmament caps at 9,086 km altitude. El Gordo exists in a conceptual regime the dome's geometry cannot represent.

code_search.found_in: monitor.py only: Domain 13 'Aetheric Redshift Scale λ_A', formula z = D/λ_A, λ_A = C/70.0 = 4283 Mpc, source 'Virgo cluster NED (WIN-047)'
code_search.api_coverage: WIN-054 through WIN-058 are NOT in api/current/predictions.json (highest entry is WIN-032). These WINs exist only as HTML text on wins.html.
code_search.monitoring_domains: 0 of 39 monitor.py domains track any cosmological claim. Domain 13 (λ_A) references WIN-047 only.
code_search.notes: The dome's entire cosmological infrastructure is: (1) one monitor.py domain that checks λ_A = c/70 against Virgo cluster distance/redshift (NED), and (2) narrative HTML assertions on the wins page. No El Gordo computation, no cluster mass function, no structure formation code, no velocity prediction, no monitoring. WIN-054 is a literature citation with a dome label.

algebraic_identity.substitution: z = D / (c/H₀) = D × H₀ / c = v/c for v = H₀D
algebraic_identity.result: Hubble's law (1929) — the foundational equation of standard observational cosmology
algebraic_identity.significance: The dome's 'aetheric redshift' is not a new physical prediction. It is Hubble's law with a symbol substitution (λ_A for c/H₀). The dome's only cosmological formula is the globe's most famous equation in disguise.

why_it_matters: WIN-054 claims El Gordo 'impossibility' validates the dome, but every number in the claim — the redshift, mass, velocity, and statistical tension — was measured and computed using globe-derived physics (GR lensing, spectroscopy, N-body simulations, ΛCDM halo mass functions). The dome's sole cosmological parameter (λ_A = 4,283 Mpc) is literally the Hubble distance. The dome cannot independently measure, compute, or predict anything about El Gordo because it has no extragalactic framework. The dome is citing a problem identified BY standard cosmology, USING standard cosmology's numbers, as evidence AGAINST standard cosmology — while providing no alternative physics of its own.
suggested_text: The dome's only cosmological infrastructure is λ<sub>A</sub> = c/H₀ = 4,283 Mpc (Domain 13 in monitor.py), which is algebraically identical to the Hubble distance — the foundational equation of standard cosmology since 1929. Every number cited in WIN-054 — the redshift (z = 0.87), the mass (2.13 × 10<sup>15</sup> M<sub>☉</sub> from GR lensing), the velocity (≥ 2,500 km/s from N-body simulations), and the 6.2σ tension (from ΛCDM halo mass functions) — was derived using standard physics. The dome borrows globe cosmology's measurements to critique globe cosmology's predictions, while its own physical universe caps at disc_radius = 20,015 km with no spatial framework for objects at ~10<sup>22</sup> km.
